mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.author_id, a.author_name, a.created_at, a.views, a.is_required, a.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = a.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file f WHERE f.board_id = a.id) AS file_count, (SELECT original_name FROM vibe.archive_file WHERE board_id = a.id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS first_file_name FROM vibe.boards a WHERE a.board_type = 'ARCHIVE' ORDER BY a.is_required DESC, a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.boards (id, board_type, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views, is_required, tags) VALUES (#{id}, 'ARCHIVE', #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{isRequired,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.boards SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.author_id, a.author_name, a.created_at, a.views, a.is_required, a.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = a.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file f WHERE f.board_id = a.id) AS file_count FROM vibe.boards a WHERE a.board_type = 'ARCHIVE' AND a.is_required = 1 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.boards SET is_required = #{isRequired} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.author_id, a.author_name, a.created_at, a.views, a.is_required, a.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = a.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file f WHERE f.board_id = a.id) AS file_count FROM vibe.boards a WHERE a.board_type = 'ARCHIVE' AND a.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.author_id, a.author_name, a.created_at, a.views, a.is_required, a.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = a.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file f WHERE f.board_id = a.id) AS file_count FROM vibe.boards a WHERE a.board_type = 'ARCHIVE' AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.author_id, a.author_name, a.created_at, a.views, a.is_required, a.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = a.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.archive_file f WHERE f.board_id = a.id) AS file_count FROM vibe.boards a WHERE a.board_type = 'ARCHIVE' AND ( a.tags = #{keyword} OR a.tags LIKE #{keyword} || ',%' OR a.tags LIKE '%,' || #{keyword} OR a.tags LIKE '%,' || #{keyword} || ',%') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
